phase.updateRule: ROADMAP must be updated every time
phase.0.name: Governance And Progress Tracking
phase.0.output: Roadmap, project rules, design system rules, and progress page
phase.1.name: Frontend Migration Foundation
phase.1.output: Next.js 16 scaffold, shared Layout, route structure, and Docker runtime
phase.2.name: Theme System
phase.3.name: i18n System
phase.3.output: react-i18next and five locale JSON files
phase.4.name: Shared UI Components
phase.4.output: Central Dialog, PageHeader, DataTable, forms, and controls
phase.5.name: Auth Foundation
phase.5.output: Consolidated auth handlers, JWT, localStorage token, and axios interceptor
phase.6.name: Backend Monolith Foundation
phase.7.name: Docker Infrastructure
phase.7.output: Simplified docker-compose.yml, Redis, and single PostgreSQL database
phase.8.name: API Contracts & DTOs
phase.8.output: OpenAPI conventions, route paths, and shared DTO types
phase.9.name: Async Queue Foundation (Optional)
phase.10.name: Core Domain Modules
phase.10.output: Customer, Product, Cylinder, and Ink modules
phase.11.name: Production Workflow Modules
phase.11.output: Sales order, planning, execution, inventory, and quality modules
phase.12.name: Observability And Audit
phase.12.output: Audit trail, health checks, logs, and correlation IDs
phase.13.name: Stabilization And Release
phase.13.output: E2E tests, release checklist, and production readiness
phase.14.name: Frontend API Integration & Polish
phase.14.output: Connect all pages to real API, fix nav bugs, audit shared components
phase.15.name: Real-Time Monitoring & Scanner
phase.15.output: WebSocket live updates, camera QR/barcode scanning, print QR labels
phase.16.name: Enterprise Identity Foundation
phase.16.output: LDAP/AD integration, SSO, password policy, session management
phase.17.name: Production Hardening
phase.17.output: Rate limiting, API throttling, performance optimization, error monitoring

criteria: Project roadmap exists and includes update rules.
Project rules file exists and defines non-negotiable implementation rules.
Design system file exists and defines visual/component consistency rules.
Frontend progress page exists and can be opened directly in a browser.
notes: This phase creates the guardrails before large migration work begins.
Completed on 2026-06-09.

criteria: App starts locally.
Existing dashboard visual direction is represented in Next.js.
No new page bypasses the shared Layout.
notes: Completed on 2026-06-09.
Local machine currently reports Node.js v22.17.0, which passes Next.js 16 minimum requirements. CI/production baseline remains Node.js 24 LTS.

criteria: All pages use classes from themeConfig.
No page hardcodes theme-dependent Tailwind classes.
Theme persists between sessions.
notes: Completed on 2026-06-09.
Provides unified HSL glassmorphism design system support.

outputs: Locale files: /src/i18n/locales/ (th, en, cn, mm, ja)
criteria: Default language is Thai (th).
UI text uses t('key').
No hardcoded visible UI text in React components.
Existing standalone language code zh is migrated to required code cn.
notes: Completed on 2026-06-09.
Five fully translated JSON files are set up and dynamically toggled.

outputs: Shared inputs, buttons, and status badges
criteria: New popups/dialogs use only shared dialog components.
Dialog styling comes from themeConfig.
Components use i18n keys for visible text.
notes: Completed on 2026-06-09.
Created central UI inputs and common layouts.

criteria: Token is stored in localStorage.
API requests attach Authorization: Bearer <token> automatically.
Protected frontend routes redirect unauthenticated users.
notes: Completed on 2026-06-09.
Wired JWT authentication context and client-side page redirect guards.

outputs: Code starter using Node.js 24 LTS + TypeScript + Express 5 + Prisma ORM 7.x
Shared error handling and route-splitting structure
criteria: Single modular monolith backend server runs successfully.
Express 5 routing groups modules logically.
notes: Completed on 2026-06-09.
Built-out clean structure with Prisma 7 config adapter-pg pool.

criteria: Docker compose stack starts database, cache, backend, and frontend.
Single database server is used.
Environment variables are documented.
notes: Completed on 2026-06-09.
Verified running completely in containers, with Next.js rewrites resolving client-side connection issues.

criteria: Frontend communicates directly with consolidated backend routes.
API is documented via OpenAPI.
notes: Completed on 2026-06-09.
Defined Swagger UI at /api-docs using a clean YAML schema.
Integrated shared DTO types in a parent-relative workspace folder mounted into both containers.

outputs: Redis/BullMQ setup if asynchronous jobs are needed (e.g., email notifications, heavy reporting)
criteria: Background jobs process without locking web request loop.
notes: Completed on 2026-06-10.
Installed and configured Redis/BullMQ to manage background tasks queue and Worker.

outputs: Core database tables and models for: Customer, Product, Cylinder, Ink
criteria: CRUD APIs are fully operational.
Input validation behaves consistently.
notes: Completed on 2026-06-10.
Core modules database migration has been executed, seed scripts are fully integrated, and CRUD services are exposed on backend.

outputs: Logic and state machines for: Sales order, planning, execution, inventory, QC
criteria: Workflow transitions are auditable.
Inventory checks are reliable.
QC inspections associate properly with cylinders and ink batches.
notes: Completed on 2026-06-10.
Successfully developed Sales Order, Planning, Production execution, Inventory warehouse, and Quality Control modules.

criteria: Critical actions are auditable.
Services expose health endpoints.
Logs include correlation IDs.
notes: Completed on 2026-06-10.
Configured correlation ID tracking, structured console logging, system-wide health checks, and database audit trails.

criteria: Main user flows pass E2E tests.
Deployment steps are documented.
Risks are reviewed and signed off.
notes: Completed on 2026-06-10.
Created deployment checklist, backup/restore instructions, security/scalability guides, and verified all integration flows via E2E smoke tests.

rule.layout: Every new page must use the shared Layout component
rule.dialog: Every Dialog or Popup must use the central component
rule.i18n: Every UI string must use t('key') and exist in all five languages
rule.theme: Every theme-dependent style must come from themeConfig
rule.database: Each service/module must maintain database isolation (shared server with schema/table isolation or separate DB)
rule.docker: The system must run through Docker Compose
architecture.frontendValue: Next.js 16, React 19, TypeScript 5.x, and Tailwind CSS 4
architecture.authValue: Identity Service issues JWTs and the frontend attaches tokens through the axios interceptor
architecture.databaseValue: PostgreSQL database with logical schema/table isolation per service/module
architecture.eventsValue: Optional in-memory events or Redis background queues
architecture.infraValue: Docker Compose, Redis, PostgreSQL, and service containers
architecture.workflowValue: Modules can be extracted into Microservices as load demands
dialog.title: Phase Details
dialog.description: Phase 1 builds the Next.js 16 Docker Desktop foundation with Layout, theme, i18n, axios, and shared components before migrating the standalone screens
